title: Health score model accuracy climbed to 0.81 this quarter
anchor: AUC improved from 0.74 last quarter and 0.67 two quarters ago, marking three consecutive quarters of lift.
connect: Override rate dropped to 11% across all tiers, down from 17% last quarter.
body: AUC improved from 0.74 last quarter and 0.67 two quarters ago, marking three consecutive quarters of lift. Override rate dropped to 11% across all tiers, down from 17% last quarter.
trace: Model performance shows sustained improvement with CSM trust increasing as override frequency declines.

title: Likelihood-to-renew model entered shadow production April 21
anchor: The probabilistic layer runs alongside the composite score and produces its own pass-fail history for direct comparison.
connect: Health score AUC sits at 0.81 currently with three quarters of consecutive improvement.
body: The probabilistic layer runs alongside the composite score and produces its own pass-fail history for direct comparison. Health score AUC sits at 0.81 currently with three quarters of consecutive improvement.
trace: Second model validation layer now running parallel to production composite scoring system.

title: CSM trust in health scores shows in override patterns
anchor: Override rate dropped to 11% from last quarter's 17% and a peak of 24%.
connect: Health score AUC climbed to 0.81 over the same improvement window.
body: Override rate dropped to 11% from last quarter's 17% and a peak of 24%. Health score AUC climbed to 0.81 over the same improvement window.
trace: CSM confidence correlates with model accuracy improvements as override frequency declines.

title: 312 playbooks completed end-to-end in the last 30 days
anchor: Completion-rate visibility became available for the first time with prior periods unmeasured.
connect: Playbook completion attribution shipped April 18 in the latest CS platform release.
body: Completion-rate visibility became available for the first time with prior periods unmeasured. Playbook completion attribution shipped April 18 in the latest CS platform release.
trace: First measurement of playbook execution outcomes now possible with new platform capabilities.

title: Product telemetry moved to real-time on April 18
anchor: Usage signals now reach the health model within minutes versus the prior 72-hour batch delay.
connect: Health score AUC improvement accelerated to 0.81 this quarter from 0.74 last quarter.
body: Usage signals now reach the health model within minutes versus the prior 72-hour batch delay. Health score AUC improvement accelerated to 0.81 this quarter from 0.74 last quarter.
trace: Real-time data integration correlates with model accuracy gains as signal latency eliminated.

title: 47 accounts moved from mid-touch to high-touch coverage
anchor: Reclassification used 14 months of actual usage and renewal data versus original onboarding tier assignments.
connect: New playbook routing begins Q3 2026 with the updated segmentation model.
body: Reclassification used 14 months of actual usage and renewal data versus original onboarding tier assignments. New playbook routing begins Q3 2026 with the updated segmentation model.
trace: Data-driven segmentation refresh moves accounts to coverage tiers matching their actual behavior patterns.

title: CS platform tooling load reduced by 40% in Q1
anchor: Three CS tools retired with connector maintenance eliminated across the integration layer.
connect: Admin bandwidth freed for health score model improvement work.
body: Three CS tools retired with connector maintenance eliminated across the integration layer. Admin bandwidth freed for health score model improvement work.
trace: Platform consolidation creates operational capacity for higher-value model development activities.

title: Handoff data completeness climbed to 84% across Q2 deals
anchor: 24 closed-won handoffs included stakeholder maps, buying reasons, and verbal commitments versus 41% in Q1.
connect: Day-0 health score accuracy improves with richer handoff record quality.
body: 24 closed-won handoffs included stakeholder maps, buying reasons, and verbal commitments versus 41% in Q1. Day-0 health score accuracy improves with richer handoff record quality.
trace: Sales-to-CS data quality improvement drives better initial health scoring accuracy.

title: BigQuery feature-usage pipeline approved for Q2
anchor: The pipeline replaces proxy login frequency signals in the health score model with actual feature engagement data.
connect: Health score AUC reached 0.81 this quarter using current proxy signals.
body: The pipeline replaces proxy login frequency signals in the health score model with actual feature engagement data. Health score AUC reached 0.81 this quarter using current proxy signals.
trace: Data warehouse integration scheduled to replace proxy signals with direct feature usage measurement.

title: Salesforce sync uptime held at 99.7% in March
anchor: Performance stayed above the 99% threshold with nightly handoff freshness supporting health model reliability.
connect: Override rate dropped to 11% as model accuracy improved to 0.81 AUC.
body: Performance stayed above the 99% threshold with nightly handoff freshness supporting health model reliability. Override rate dropped to 11% as model accuracy improved to 0.81 AUC.
trace: Integration uptime maintains data freshness required for accurate health scoring.

title: 2026 CS benchmark data arrives April 30
anchor: Current segmentation model runs on 2025 baseline data with fresh industry ratios enabling coverage tier tuning.
connect: 47 accounts already reclassified from mid-touch to high-touch based on actual usage patterns.
body: Current segmentation model runs on 2025 baseline data with fresh industry ratios enabling coverage tier tuning. 47 accounts already reclassified from mid-touch to high-touch based on actual usage patterns.
trace: Industry benchmark refresh provides updated calibration data for existing segmentation model.

title: Custom Permissions launch traces to Beacon Logistics renewal

connect: Product telemetry moved to real-time April 18, enabling this level of attribution visibility.
body: Feature released March 8, health score stayed green 21 consecutive days, early renewal conversation opened April 2, contract signed April 14. Product telemetry moved to real-time April 18, enabling this level of attribution visibility.
trace: End-to-end product event to renewal attribution demonstrates pipeline tracking capabilities.

title: Q1 onboarding completion reached 89% across 9 cohorts
anchor: Activation milestones feed back as enriched signals into the health model scoring system.

body: Activation milestones feed back as enriched signals into the health model scoring system. Health score AUC improved to 0.81 this quarter with better signal quality from multiple sources.

title: Mid-market NRR held at 117% for three consecutive quarters
anchor: Performance stayed above the 110% benchmark through Q3 2025, Q4 2025, and Q1 2026.
connect: Coverage tier refresh moved 47 accounts to high-touch based on renewal and usage patterns.
body: Performance stayed above the 110% benchmark through Q3 2025, Q4 2025, and Q1 2026. Coverage tier refresh moved 47 accounts to high-touch based on renewal and usage patterns.

title: Platform completion attribution enables outcome measurement

connect: 312 playbooks completed end-to-end in the last 30 days with new measurement visibility.
body: Feature shipped April 18 allowing playbook execution tracking from trigger to finish for the first time. 312 playbooks completed end-to-end in the last 30 days with new measurement visibility.

title: Model accuracy and CSM confidence move in parallel
anchor: Health score AUC climbed from 0.67 to 0.81 over three quarters while override rate dropped from 24% to 11%.
connect: Likelihood-to-renew model entered shadow production April 21 for parallel validation.
body: Health score AUC climbed from 0.67 to 0.81 over three quarters while override rate dropped from 24% to 11%. Likelihood-to-renew model entered shadow production April 21 for parallel validation.
trace: Correlation between predictive accuracy and CSM adoption validates model improvement strategy.

title: Data infrastructure upgrades converged in April
anchor: Real-time telemetry sync launched April 18, completion attribution shipped the same day, BigQuery pipeline approved April 22.
connect: Health score override rate dropped to 11% as model accuracy reached 0.81 AUC.
body: Real-time telemetry sync launched April 18, completion attribution shipped the same day, BigQuery pipeline approved April 22. Health score override rate dropped to 11% as model accuracy reached 0.81 AUC.
trace: Infrastructure improvements cluster in single month with corresponding model performance gains.

title: Segmentation refresh uses behavioral data over assignment data
anchor: 47 accounts reclassified based on 14 months of actual usage and renewal patterns versus original onboarding tiers.
connect: Mid-market NRR performance held at 117% for three consecutive quarters.
body: 47 accounts reclassified based on 14 months of actual usage and renewal patterns versus original onboarding tiers. Mid-market NRR performance held at 117% for three consecutive quarters.
